# Engineering Team Meeting — March 2025

## Attendees
Alice, Bob, Charlie, Diana, Eve

## Decisions
Decided to migrate to PostgreSQL by Q4 due to scalability requirements. The migration will be phased: read replicas first, then full cutover.

## Action Items
- Alice: Draft PostgreSQL migration plan by March 15
- Bob: Benchmark query performance on test dataset
- Charlie: Update ORM configuration for dual-database support
